# PHIL.043 ? Thomism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** medieval_religious

**Domain:** MEDIEVAL_RELIGIOUS

## Core Principles
Aristotelian Christianity; analogy of being; five ways to prove God; natural law; act and potency; essence and existence distinction

## Application
Use Aristotelian categories theologically; natural theology; analogical reasoning; natural law ethics; systematic metaphysics

## Key Values
- Faith-reason synthesis
- Natural law
- Systematic theology
- Analogical method
